nodes.context: White supremacist prison gang founded in 1985 in Texas, involved in drug trafficking and other crimes.
White supremacist prison gang from which the Aryan Circle splintered.
White supremacist prison gang that fought a war with the Aryan Circle in the mid-1990s.

edges.context: The Aryan Circle was founded as a splinter group of the Aryan Brotherhood of Texas in 1985.
The Aryan Circle was involved in a bloody war with the White Knights in the mid-1990s.
